name: Pirao De Arroz Com Leite De Coco
recipeIngredient: 4 cups Coconut milk made with 2 fresh coconuts and 4 cups Milk
recipeInstructions:
1. In a heavy saucepan (2- to 3-quart), scald 3 cups of the coconut milk by warming it over moderate heat until tiny bubbles form around the edge of the pan.
2. In a small bowl, combine the remaining 1 cup of coconut milk with the rice flour and salt. Stir constantly and pour gradually into the scalded milk.
3. Reduce the heat to low and cook, stirring, until the mixture is thick and smooth.
4. Pour the pudding into a lightly buttered or oiled 1-quart metal or porcelain mold or into 6 individual 6- to 8-ounce custard molds.
5. Cool the pudding to room temperature. Refrigerate for at least 4 hours, or until the pudding is firm.
6. To unmold, run a thin, sharp knife around the inside edge of the mold. Dip the bottom of the mold in hot water for a few seconds. Place an inverted plate over the top of the mold and grasp both firmly together. Turn them upside down quickly and tap the plate sharply on the table. The pudding should slip out easily. If it doesn't, repeat the process.
